title: Electric Citrus Juicer Rechargeable - Electric Juicer Machines with USB and Cleaning Brush Portable Compact Juicer for Orange, Lemon, Limes
features: 🎁 【WHY CHOOSE DUSENHO JUICER? 】The Electric Juicer is renowned for its exceptional quality and captivating aesthetics. Powered by a robust 45-watt motor, it effortlessly crafts a cup of juice within merely 20 seconds, operating with minimal noise and remaining stable without any shaking or tipping. Revel in the pleasure of presenting your beloved ones and family with freshly squeezed juice each day!

🍊 【FASHIONABLE & PORTABLE DESIGN 】Our juicer is ingeniously portable. You can conveniently carry it in your bag, enabling you to take it wherever you go. The electric juicer adopts USB-C technology for charging, offering unparalleled convenience when you're outdoors or traveling. No need to fret about running out of power. (Note: For safety reasons, it cannot be used while charging.)

🍏 【FRESHLY SQUEEZED CITRUS JUICER 】Suitable for all types of citrus fruits - oranges, lemons, limes, and other organic citrus fruits (up to 2.9 inches in diameter). You'll always relish a seedless, refreshing fruit juice! Indulge in this delightful experience!

🍋 【EASY TO USE & CLEAN 】Our electric juicer is exceptionally easy to clean thanks to its detachable components. It comes equipped with a brush to facilitate the cleaning process. However, please refrain from washing the electric main body; other parts can be hand-washed.

💖 【WHAT YOU GET 】You'll receive the DUSENHO juicer, a 48cm USB C Cable, a cleaning brush, a user manual, our worry-fre e 12-month warra nty, and friendly customer service. If any issues arise regarding the product, please feel fre e to contact us. DUSENHO specializes in providing buyers with high-quality kitchen appliance products and unparalleled user experiences.
😊 【SAFETY AND HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL】The electric juicer is meticulously crafted from BP A-fre e ABS material, ensuring it's safe for both children and adults to savor fresh and healthy juice.

📑 【TIPS】1. When you obtain the juicer, please ensure a full charge before usage. 2. For safety purposes, it cannot be operated while charging. 3. Press and hold the switch for 3 seconds to activate the electric juicer, and press it again to commence juicing. 4. If the button displays a red light, it indicates the need for charging. 5. If the button shows a white light, it means it's fully charged and ready for use.

📑 【TIPS】1. Do not wash the main unit of the juicer to prevent damage. 2. It is recommended to use a charger of "5V-1A/5V-2A". Using a charger greater than 5V=2A may result in the appearance of charging but actual incomplete charging. Using a charger less than 5V-1A may prevent the product from being fully charged for an extended period.
